meta.title: Don Micka de la Vega — Sports Photographer
meta.description: Sports photography portfolio of Don Micka de la Vega. Women's cycling captured with an editorial, cinematic eye.

hero.tagline: One eye. One Vision. Zero Limits

bio.name: Don Micka de la Vega
bio.heading: Women's Cycling — Aesthetics & Intensity
bio.portraitAlt: Don Micka de la Vega, sports photographer

marquee.text: Capturing power | Structuring movement | Elevating the image of sport.

editorial.intro: Specializing in women's cycling, I develop a demanding visual approach applied to sport.
editorial.introAccent: My work stands at the intersection of performance and art direction. Every image is conceived, constructed, and controlled.
editorial.focus: Women's cycling is at the heart of my work. Discipline, endurance, rigor. A raw aesthetic translated into strong, editorial imagery.
editorial.focusAccent: Each project aims to redefine how the athlete is represented.

craft.light: Light shapes the body. Movement becomes composition. Effort becomes aesthetic.
craft.lightAccent: I don't document sport. I craft it with precision.
craft.standard: This visual standard extends to other disciplines. Football, training environments, hybrid projects.
craft.standardAccent: The field changes. The intention remains.
